publishedAbstract: In some instances, it may be necessary to test whether a pod can mount a volume provided by ODF/Ceph. If followed correctly, the pod should mount the PVC and become `Running`. **NOTE:** For testing custom storageclasses, ensure the PVC configuration changes to the correct storageclass name.
publishedTitle: Create a Pod/PVC to Test Mounting Functionality of an OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) StorageClass Volume
